name: Second Take
overview: Yi Ze, a perfectionist director, has been searching for the perfect lead actress....until her ex, Zong Xia, shows up. They reunite on set after five years. Old feelings and wounds surface.

trailers.title: [SUB]《愛情重拍中Second Take》正式預告｜導演與當紅演員的職場禁忌，光影之下，愛情還能否重拍一次？GL Series
